---
title: "Steel Building Design"
format: pdf
---

```{=latex}
\newpage
\vspace*{\fill}
\begin{center}
\Huge\textbf{Appendix 1} \\[0.5em]
\Huge\textbf{Design of Primary Beams}
\end{center}
\vspace*{\fill}
\newpage
``` 

```{=latex}
\newpage
\vspace*{\fill}
\begin{center}
\Huge\textbf{Appendix 2} \\[0.5em]
\Huge\textbf{Design of Secondary Beams}
\end{center}
\vspace*{\fill}
\newpage
``` 

```{=latex}
\newpage
\vspace*{\fill}
\begin{center}
\Huge\textbf{Appendix 3} \\[0.5em]
\Huge\textbf{Design of Columns}
\end{center}
\vspace*{\fill}
\newpage
``` 

```{=latex}
\newpage
\vspace*{\fill}
\begin{center}
\Huge\textbf{Appendix 4} \\[0.5em]
\Huge\textbf{Design of Frame Deflection}
\end{center}
\vspace*{\fill}
\newpage
``` 

```{=latex}
\newpage
\vspace*{\fill}
\begin{center}
\Huge\textbf{Appendix 5} \\[0.5em]
\Huge\textbf{Design of Bracing Members}
\end{center}
\vspace*{\fill}
\newpage
``` 


```{=latex}
\newpage
\vspace*{\fill}
\begin{center}
\Huge\textbf{Appendix 6} \\[0.5em]
\Huge\textbf{Design of Scheme A}
\end{center}
\vspace*{\fill}
\newpage
``` 

```{=latex}
\newpage
\vspace*{\fill}
\begin{center}
\Huge\textbf{Appendix 7} \\[0.5em]
\Huge\textbf{Design of Scheme B}
\end{center}
\vspace*{\fill}
\newpage
``` 

```{=latex}
\newpage
\vspace*{\fill}
\begin{center}
\Huge\textbf{Appendix 8} \\[0.5em]
\Huge\textbf{Design of Connections}
\end{center}
\vspace*{\fill}
\newpage
```
